title: Post-cleavage target residence determines asymmetry in non-homologous end joining of Cas12a-induced DNA double strand breaks
author: Chen, ruodan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The original data of the article “Post-cleavage target residence determines asymmetry in non-homologous end joining of Cas12a-induced DNA double strand breaks” , including gene knock-in flow data, WB original gel image, DNA agarose gel image, immunofluorescence image and Sanger sequencing of PCR products.
